name: Stick War 2: Champion Archer
description:
A tribute to the grandfather of Stick War: the original Champion Archer by 2dArray. Enjoy an arcade-like experience of Champion Archer within Stick War 2, complete with User Control, upgrades, and more!

You can user control units with keybind "F".
additionalCredits:
Eli Piilonen for making Champion Archer.
AsePlayer for user control code.
